description: §21.3 — an `import` at the top of a file-level `${ }` logic block (with the sibling m.scrml present via the `files` convention) is the correct placement; E-IMPORT-003 and E-IMPORT-006 both stay silent.
rationale: §21.3: imports belong at file top-level in a `${ }` logic preamble. This is the well-placed twin of the reject case; E-IMPORT-003 (import-in-function-body) must not fire. The aux m.scrml exports helper() so E-IMPORT-004/006 also stay silent.
